plotfont¶

These attributes are native attributes from matplotlib,

please see http://matplotlib.sourceforge.net/api/font_manager_api.html#matplotlib.font_manager.FontProperties

Summary¶

keyword default attribute value
family sans-serif    
    unique True
    validate ValidateChoice
      serif
      sans-serif
      cursive
      fantasy
      monospace
       
fname None    
    unique True
       
size [‘medium’]    
    unique True
    validate ValidateChoice
      xx-small
      x-small
      small
      medium
      large
      x-large
      xx-large
       
stretch [‘normal’]    
    unique True
    validate ValidateChoice
      float
      ultra-condensed
      extra-condensed
      condensed
      semi-condensed
      normal
      semi-expanded
      expanded
      extra-expanded
      ultra-expanded
       
style [‘normal’]    
    unique True
    validate ValidateChoice
      normal
      italic
      oblique
       
variant [‘normal’]    
    unique True
    validate ValidateChoice
      normal
      small-caps
       
weight [‘normal’]    
    unique True
    validate ValidateChoice
      float
      ultralight
      light
      normal
      regular
      book
      medium
      roman
      semibold
      demibold
      demi
      bold
      heavy
      extra bold
      black
